name: io.github.manushi4/screenhand
description: Give AI eyes and hands on your desktop. Native MCP server for desktop automation — click buttons, type text, read UI trees, control any app via Accessibility APIs at ~50ms per action. Works on macOS and Windows.

environmentVariables.description: Adapter type: accessibility (default), cdp, composite, or placeholder
environmentVariables.name: SCREENHAND_ADAPTER

environmentVariables.description: Set to 1 to run browser in headless mode
environmentVariables.name: SCREENHAND_HEADLESS
